readFile.imageTooLarge: File gambar terlalu besar ({{size}} MB). Ukuran maksimum yang diizinkan adalah {{max}} MB.

toolRepetitionLimitReached: Zoo tampaknya terjebak dalam loop, mencoba aksi yang sama ({{toolName}}) berulang kali. Ini mungkin menunjukkan masalah dengan strategi saat ini. Pertimbangkan untuk mengubah frasa tugas, memberikan instruksi yang lebih spesifik, atau mengarahkannya ke pendekatan yang berbeda.
unknownToolError: Zoo mencoba menggunakan alat yang tidak dikenal: "{{toolName}}". Mencoba lagi...

searchFiles.workspaceBoundaryError: Tidak dapat mencari di luar workspace. Path '{{path}}' berada di luar workspace saat ini.

errors.policy_restriction: Gagal membuat tugas baru karena pembatasan kebijakan.

generateImage.openRouterApiKeyRequired: Kunci API OpenRouter diperlukan untuk menghasilkan gambar dengan model OpenRouter. Silakan konfigurasikan di pengaturan eksperimental Pembuatan Gambar.
generateImage.noImageGenerated: Tidak ada gambar yang dihasilkan dalam respons
generateImage.invalidImageData: Data gambar tidak valid dalam respons

roo.authRequired: Autentikasi Zoo Code Cloud diperlukan untuk menghasilkan gambar. Silakan masuk ke Zoo Code Cloud.

executeParallelSubtask.description: Execute multiple subtasks in parallel with DAG-based dependency resolution, lock-aware scheduling, and blackboard communication.
executeParallelSubtask.paramTasks: Array of subtask definitions with dependencies
executeParallelSubtask.paramMaxParallel: Maximum parallel subtasks (null for default which is typically 4)
executeParallelSubtask.paramId: Unique identifier for this subtask (referenced by deps in other tasks)
executeParallelSubtask.paramMode: Mode slug to execute this subtask in (e.g., code, debug, architect)
executeParallelSubtask.paramPrompt: The actual instructions/prompt for the subtask
executeParallelSubtask.paramOutputFiles: Files this subtask writes (locked for write access)
executeParallelSubtask.paramDeps: IDs of tasks that must complete before this one starts
executeParallelSubtask.paramSubscribedTopics: Blackboard topics to subscribe to for data
executeParallelSubtask.paramPublishedTopics: Blackboard topics to publish data to
executeParallelSubtask.paramIsCritical: If true, failure of this subtask fails the entire execution

executeParallelChildTask.description: Execute multiple child tasks in parallel with DAG-based dependency resolution, lock-aware scheduling, and blackboard communication.
executeParallelChildTask.paramTasks: Array of child task definitions with dependencies
executeParallelChildTask.paramMaxParallel: Maximum parallel child tasks (null for default which is typically 4)
executeParallelChildTask.paramId: Unique identifier for this child task (referenced by deps in other tasks)
executeParallelChildTask.paramMode: Mode slug to execute this child task in (e.g., code, debug, architect)
executeParallelChildTask.paramMessage: The actual instructions/prompt for the child task
executeParallelChildTask.paramTodos: Optional initial todo list for the child task (markdown checklist format)
executeParallelChildTask.paramOutputFiles: Files this child task writes (locked for write access)
executeParallelChildTask.paramDeps: IDs of tasks that must complete before this one starts
executeParallelChildTask.paramSubscribedTopics: Blackboard topics to subscribe to for data
